cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Salesforce LDV at 200 Million Records'. Subtitle in white: 'Partitioning, selectivity, async processing, and hot-warm-cold data strategy'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Access Layer' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'LWC Native State', 'GraphQL API v64.0', 'Keyset Pagination' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Processing Layer' vivid purple border — modules 'Bulk API 2.0', 'Platform Events', 'Queueable + Batch Apex' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Data Layer' vivid teal/green border — modules 'Hot Salesforce Objects', 'Data 360 Zero Copy', 'Archive Store' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'Selective Query Plan' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'ERP Integration' and 'Data Warehouse Sync'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'LDV Design Flow' → 'Partition' → 'Index' → 'Archive' → 'Observe'. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'LDV Query Selectivity at 200M Records'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'LDV Query Selectivity at 200M Records'. Subtitle 'The WHERE clause is not enough — the leading filter must reduce the scan'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'High Cardinality with hash icon', 'Bounded Date Range with calendar icon', 'No OFFSET Pagination with warning icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'NON-SELECTIVE QUERY' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SELECTIVE QUERY' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id FROM Service_Ledger__c WHERE Status__c = \\'Active\\' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 200'; right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'SELECT Id FROM Service_Ledger__c WHERE Account_Shard__c = \\'A17\\' AND Event_Time__c >= 2026-07-01T00:00:00Z AND Event_Time__c < 2026-07-02T00:00:00Z ORDER BY Event_Time__c, Id LIMIT 200'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Drive from indexed partition key', 'Bound time windows', 'Validate Query Plan'. Footer bar: 'At 200M records, every access path needs a contract'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'LDV Integration Contract: Full Sync vs Incremental Windows'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'LDV Integration Contract: Full Sync vs Incremental Windows'. Subtitle 'Bulk movement must be partitioned, idempotent, and observable'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'External ID Idempotency with key icon', 'SystemModstamp Windows with clock icon', 'Shard-Based Work Queues with queue icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'FULL SYNC SMELL' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'INCREMENTAL CONTRACT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id, External_Event_Id__c FROM Service_Ledger__c WHERE Processing_Status__c = \\'Pending\\''; right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'SELECT Id, External_Event_Id__c FROM Service_Ledger__c WHERE Account_Shard__c = \\'A17\\' AND SystemModstamp >= 2026-07-15T00:00:00Z AND SystemModstamp < 2026-07-15T01:00:00Z'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'No unbounded nightly scans', 'Use replayable events', 'Track extract watermarks'. Footer bar: 'Integration volume is an architecture problem, not a retry setting'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
